options: The material sent to the customer may be returned
The customer may not send back the material in case it is of low value
correct_answers: The material sent to the customer may be returned

question: Which of the following statements is true regarding billing plans?
options: Billing plan cannot be blocked for billing
Milestone billing plan is used for plant engineering and construction where the billing dates need to be spread over
Periodic billing plan is used for plant engineering and construction where the billing dates need to be spread
Document flow is updated for billing plans for the first invoice; subsequent billing does not update the document flow
correct_answers: Milestone billing plan is used for plant engineering and construction where the billing dates need to be spread over

question: Material for specific customer not to buy the material from the vendor is:
What are the types of value contracts?

Cash Sales process is:
options: A process where the customer places the sales order and picks and pays for the goods at the same time
A proposed agreement on a price and quantity for a particular material and particular source for a particular date
A process whereby customers are undertaking for material source
correct_answers: A process where the customer places the sales order and picks and pays for the goods at the same time

question: Which of the following statement is regarding billing plan?
options: The following are the three types of billing plan: periodic, contracted, milestone
Billing plan types can be in the header and item level
The date category can be changed in the item
The billing plan type that is created at header level
correct_answers: Billing plan types can be in the header and item level

question: When will the status of delivery be updated to "completed"?
options: After the picking and packing is done
After the goods issue has been done
After the billing document has been created
After the accounting document has been posted in FI
After the accounting document has been cleared with an incoming payment
correct_answers: After the goods issue has been done
